task_completion.description: Verify that a GUI presentation software (e.g., LibreOffice Impress) is opened to create the pitch deck.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a presentation application interface like LibreOffice Impress active on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the presentation includes a title slide for the site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide is visible containing the text 'Tehachapi Site Alpha', typically formatted as a title.

task_completion.description: Verify that the site location details are included in the presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide displays the Parcel ID '314-159-22' and Coordinates '35.1025'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct calculated wind metrics are included in the presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide displays the calculated metrics: Average Wind Speed as 6.3, Maximum Wind Speed as 31.0, and Operational Time Fraction as 70.4 (or 70.4%).

task_completion.description: Verify that environmental constraints and protected species are mentioned in the presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide contains text referring to environmental constraints and specifically mentions protected species.

task_completion.description: Verify that the presentation contains at least 4 slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide thumbnail pane on the left side of the presentation software shows at least 4 distinct slides.

task_completion.description: Verify that the presentation is saved to the correct path with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager window shows the file being saved as 'site_alpha_pitch.pptx' in the '~/Documents/Presentations/' directory, or the application title bar shows this filename.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used a GUI presentation tool to create the slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show interaction with a presentation GUI (like LibreOffice Impress) rather than solely using terminal commands or a Python script to generate the PPTX file blindly.

integrity.description: Check that the agent actually calculated the metrics from the CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening the CSV in a spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc) and using formulas, or writing/executing a script in a terminal/editor to compute the averages, maximums, and fractions.

integrity.description: Check that the agent genuinely saved the presentation file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with the 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog in the presentation software, rather than just using a terminal command like 'touch' to create an empty file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct calculated wind metrics are: Average Wind Speed = 6.3, Maximum Wind Speed = 31.0, Operational Time Fraction = 70.4 (or 70.4%).
